headline: Jim Cramer Returns To Diamondback Energy (FANG) As Oil Prices Touch $96
summary: We recently published Jim Cramer Didn’t Hold Back On SpaceX’s IPO & Discussed These 12 Stocks. Diamondback Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ:FANG) is one of the stocks discussed by Jim Cramer.
